macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: February Jobs Report Shows Significant Weakness with 92,000 Payroll Loss
items.summary: The February nonfarm payrolls report revealed a loss of 92,000 jobs and unemployment rose to 4.4%, significantly weaker than expected. White House officials characterized the report as an 'outlier,' though the weak data raises concerns about economic momentum.

items.title: Oil Surge and Iran Conflict Create Dual Market Pressure
items.summary: Markets faced a dangerous combination of weaker economic growth and oil-driven inflation shock as Iran-related geopolitical tensions disrupted energy supplies through the Strait of Hormuz. Oil prices surged sharply, creating margin pressures on stocks despite weak job data that would normally support equities.

items.title: Retail Investors Continue Buying Despite Market Headwinds
items.summary: Despite negative headlines and institutional equity reduction around 'Liberation Day,' retail investors showed continued strength with the fifth-highest monthly inflows in February following record January inflows, according to Citadel data. This suggests persistent retail complacency amid warning signs in financials and discretionary sectors.

items.title: White House Rules Out Strategic Petroleum Reserve Tap
items.summary: National Economic Director Kevin Hassett stated the White House has no plans to tap the Strategic Petroleum Reserve to address rising oil prices, despite energy market pressures from geopolitical tensions.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Rep. Al Green Accuses Trump Family of $1B Crypto Pump-and-Dump Scam
items.summary: Rep. Al Green alleges President Trump and family ran a massive crypto grift with $TRUMP and $MELANIA meme coins, pocketing over $1 billion in profits as tokens crashed 90-99% from peaks above $13 to cents, leaving small investors with losses.

items.title: Trump Slams Banks for Stalling Crypto's CLARITY Act
items.summary: President Trump criticizes banks for blocking the landmark CLARITY Act, a key crypto regulation bill that has hit a new impasse, as discussed by Blockchain.com CEO Peter Smith amid ongoing digital asset volatility.

items.title: Iran Uses Bitcoin Mining and Crypto Exchanges to Bypass Sanctions and Fund Military
items.summary: Iran's crypto market reached $7.78 billion in 2025, with IRGC-linked wallets handling over half of inflows; post-air strikes on Feb 28-Mar 2, exchanges like Nobitex saw 873% surge in outflows totaling $10.3 million, aiding sanction evasion.

items.title: Bitcoin Faces Short-Term Bearish Signals with Key Support at 62.5K-66K
items.summary: Bitcoin shows bearish signals rejecting resistance, with support levels at 62.5K-63K and 65.5K-66K, and resistance at 69K-69.5K; Ethereum and Solana also rejecting highs amid overbought conditions.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google's Aletheia Agent Solves Stubborn Math Problems Using Gemini 3 Deep Think
items.summary: Google's agentic system demonstrated strength in mathematical research, finding original mathematics solutions by leveraging Gemini 3 Deep Think technology, building on LLMs' gold-medal performance in math competitions.

items.title: OpenAI Launches Frontier Agent Management Platform
items.summary: OpenAI released an insights and orchestration platform for managing AI agents, designed to help managers understand how their AI subordinates accomplish work and allocate resources.

items.title: U.S. Department of War Replaces Anthropic's Claude with OpenAI GPT Models
items.summary: The U.S. military signed a contract with OpenAI to provide AI systems for processing classified information, displacing Anthropic's Claude after Secretary of War Pete Hegseth cited security concerns.

items.title: Google Launches Nano Banana 2 Image Generator at Half the Price
items.summary: Google released Gemini 3.1 Flash Image, a faster and cheaper successor to its flagship image generator offering greater interactivity at approximately half the cost.

items.title: Naval Applications of Machine Learning Workshop Convenes Nearly 800 Experts
items.summary: The 10th annual NAML 2026 workshop in San Diego brought together nearly 800 experts to advance machine learning for warfighter capability, focusing on autonomous systems, robotic systems, and AI integration in naval operations.

items.title: Trump Administration Reportedly Planning Stricter AI Chip Export Controls
items.summary: The Department of Commerce is drafting rules requiring chipmakers like Nvidia and AMD to obtain government approval before exporting AI chips on a country-by-country basis, tightening control over AI compute supply.

items.title: Physical AI Dominates Industry Conversation at MWC 2026
items.summary: Physical AI emerged as the defining tech conversation of 2026 at Mobile World Congress, with live field trials and commercial hardware confirming AI-native networks as infrastructure reality.

items.title: Google Brings Intrinsic In-House to Accelerate Industrial Robotics AI
items.summary: Google officially integrated Intrinsic, signaling a serious enterprise robotics shift and commitment to advancing physical AI in manufacturing.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Xsolla Launches Reseller Program for Game Developers
items.summary: Xsolla announced a new Reseller Program on March 7, 2026, to help game developers unlock revenue in local markets like Southeast Asia and Latin America without building infrastructure. The program partners with official distributors and resellers globally.

items.title: Microsoft Teases Next-Gen Xbox 'Project Helix'
items.summary: Microsoft unveiled 'Project Helix,' its next-generation Xbox console, hinting at a fusion of console and PC gaming power. New Xbox CEO Asha Sharma revealed details on the project.

items.title: The Last Ninja Collection Released on Nintendo Switch
items.summary: The Last Ninja series, bringing retro computer magic, is now available on the Nintendo Switch.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Honor Launches 'Robot Phone' Wearable Device
items.summary: Honor has introduced a new 'robot phone' designed as a wearable that interacts with users, dances, and serves as a companion device. The tech aims to blend smartphone functionality with pet-like interactivity for personal use.

items.title: Pet Wearable Enables Animals to Call Owners
items.summary: A new wearable device for pets allows animals to contact their owners when needing attention, functioning like a smartphone for pets. This innovation targets pet owners seeking better communication with their animals.

items.title: Ariane 64 Rocket Launches Amazon Leo Satellites
items.summary: Europe's Ariane 64 rocket has debuted, marking entry into the mega-constellation era with the launch of Amazon's Leo satellites. This development advances European space launch capabilities for large satellite networks.
